title: premna obtusifolia f. serratifolia
intro: Premna obtusifolia f. serratifolia, also known as Java tea tree, is a variety of the Premna obtusifolia plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Java tea tree include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in wound healing and as an antiseptic. Java tea tree can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, and is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions.
